title: Began B.Tech, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering
description: Started at Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT), Nagpur.

title: Bench-Scale Beneficiation of Mn Ore
description: Beneficiated manganese ore using hydrocyclone separation, roll crushing, and planetary ball milling to optimize ore quality and yield (under Dr. Ravindra Taiwade, VNIT Nagpur).

title: Research Internship, IIT Roorkee
description: Synthesized polyurethane microspheres, integrated them into an epoxy resin matrix, and fabricated syntactic foam.

title: Aluminium Foam Fabrication & Characterization
description: Synthesized aluminium foam from recycled cans using eggshell powder as a foaming agent; optimized foaming-agent volume fraction and characterized microstructure via SEM (under Prof. Atul Ballal, VNIT Nagpur).

title: Fracture & Tensile Properties of 3D-Printed PLA
description: Studied the effect of layer thickness and infill pattern on the mechanical properties of FDM-printed PLA, using tensile and three-point bend testing, Digital Image Correlation, and SEM fractography (under Dr. S.R. Reddy, VNIT Nagpur).

title: Final Year Project: Investment Casting Optimization
description: Hybrid investment casting route for art objects combining FDM-based patterning, LSR mold replication, and wax casting, using flux-treated recycled aluminium with vacuum-assisted pouring (under Dr. S.R. Reddy, VNIT Nagpur).

title: GATE 2026 — All India Rank 281 (Metallurgical Engineering)
description: Also recognized as Class Topper in Process Optimization and Failure Analysis.

title: FDM PETG vs. PETG-CF Research Paper
description: Full factorial study (2 materials × 3 layer thicknesses × 3 infill densities) on FDM-printed PETG and PETG-CF, tested per ASTM D638 with DIC strain mapping and SEM fractography. Investigating whether carbon-fiber reinforcement changes the deformation and failure mechanism, not just the numbers.

title: Graduating — B.Tech, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering, VNIT Nagpur
description: Completing the degree with a focus on physical metallurgy and materials characterization.

title: Materials R&D / Failure Analysis Role
description: Looking for hands-on roles in materials R&D, failure analysis, semiconductor materials, or advanced manufacturing.
